queries.sql: select `attributes`.* from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` inner join `attribute_groups` on `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = `attribute_groups`.`id` inner join `attribute_families` on `attribute_groups`.`attribute_family_id` = `attribute_families`.`id` where `attribute_families`.`id` = 1
select * from `attribute_groups` where `attribute_groups`.`attribute_family_id` = 1 and `attribute_groups`.`attribute_family_id` is not null order by `position` asc

select `attributes`.*, `product_super_attributes`.`product_id` as `pivot_product_id`, `product_super_attributes`.`attribute_id` as `pivot_attribute_id` from `attributes` inner join `product_super_attributes` on `attributes`.`id` = `product_super_attributes`.`attribute_id` where `product_super_attributes`.`product_id` = 315887

select `attributes`.*, `attribute_translations`.`name` as `admin_name`, `attribute_translations`.`locale`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` as `pivot_attribute_group_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` as `pivot_attribute_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`position` as `pivot_position` from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` left join `attribute_translations` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_translations`.`attribute_id` and `attribute_translations`.`locale` = 'en' where `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = 1 and 1 = 1 order by `pivot_position` asc
select * from `attribute_options` where `attribute_options`.`attribute_id` = 23 and `attribute_options`.`attribute_id` is not null order by `sort_order` asc

statements.sql: select * from `product_images` where `product_images`.`product_id` in (315887) order by `position` asc
select * from `product_videos` where `product_videos`.`product_id` in (315887) order by `position` asc

select `locales`.*, `channel_locales`.`channel_id` as `pivot_channel_id`, `channel_locales`.`locale_id` as `pivot_locale_id` from `locales` inner join `channel_locales` on `locales`.`id` = `channel_locales`.`locale_id` where `channel_locales`.`channel_id` = 1
select * from `product_flat` where `product_flat`.`product_id` = 315887 and `product_flat`.`product_id` is not null and `channel` = 'default' and `locale` = 'en' limit 1

select `attributes`.* from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` inner join `attribute_groups` on `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = `attribute_groups`.`id` inner join `attribute_families` on `attribute_groups`.`attribute_family_id` = `attribute_families`.`id` where `attribute_families`.`id` = 1

select `categories`.`id`, `category_translations`.`name` from `categories` inner join `category_translations` on `categories`.`id` = `category_translations`.`category_id` and `category_translations`.`locale` = 'en' order by `category_translations`.`name` asc

select `categories`.*, `product_categories`.`product_id` as `pivot_product_id`, `product_categories`.`category_id` as `pivot_category_id` from `categories` inner join `product_categories` on `categories`.`id` = `product_categories`.`category_id` where `product_categories`.`product_id` = 315887
select * from `channel_translations` where `channel_translations`.`channel_id` = 1 and `channel_translations`.`channel_id` is not null
select * from `channel_translations` where `channel_translations`.`channel_id` = 1 and `channel_translations`.`channel_id` is not null
select * from `attribute_groups` where `attribute_groups`.`attribute_family_id` = 1 and `attribute_groups`.`attribute_family_id` is not null order by `position` asc

select `attributes`.*, `product_super_attributes`.`product_id` as `pivot_product_id`, `product_super_attributes`.`attribute_id` as `pivot_attribute_id` from `attributes` inner join `product_super_attributes` on `attributes`.`id` = `product_super_attributes`.`attribute_id` where `product_super_attributes`.`product_id` = 315887

select `attributes`.*, `attribute_translations`.`name` as `admin_name`, `attribute_translations`.`locale`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` as `pivot_attribute_group_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` as `pivot_attribute_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`position` as `pivot_position` from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` left join `attribute_translations` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_translations`.`attribute_id` and `attribute_translations`.`locale` = 'en' where `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = 1 and 1 = 1 order by `pivot_position` asc
select * from `attribute_options` where `attribute_options`.`attribute_id` = 23 and `attribute_options`.`attribute_id` is not null order by `sort_order` asc
select * from `attribute_options` where `attribute_options`.`attribute_id` = 24 and `attribute_options`.`attribute_id` is not null order by `sort_order` asc

select `attributes`.*, `attribute_translations`.`name` as `admin_name`, `attribute_translations`.`locale`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` as `pivot_attribute_group_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` as `pivot_attribute_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`position` as `pivot_position` from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` left join `attribute_translations` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_translations`.`attribute_id` and `attribute_translations`.`locale` = 'en' where `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = 2 and 1 = 1 order by `pivot_position` asc

select `attributes`.*, `attribute_translations`.`name` as `admin_name`, `attribute_translations`.`locale`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` as `pivot_attribute_group_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` as `pivot_attribute_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`position` as `pivot_position` from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` left join `attribute_translations` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_translations`.`attribute_id` and `attribute_translations`.`locale` = 'en' where `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = 3 and 1 = 1 order by `pivot_position` asc
select * from `product_customizable_options` where `product_customizable_options`.`product_id` = 315887 and `product_customizable_options`.`product_id` is not null order by `sort_order` asc

select `products`.*, `product_up_sells`.`parent_id` as `pivot_parent_id`, `product_up_sells`.`child_id` as `pivot_child_id` from `products` inner join `product_up_sells` on `products`.`id` = `product_up_sells`.`child_id` where `product_up_sells`.`parent_id` = 315887

select `products`.*, `product_cross_sells`.`parent_id` as `pivot_parent_id`, `product_cross_sells`.`child_id` as `pivot_child_id` from `products` inner join `product_cross_sells` on `products`.`id` = `product_cross_sells`.`child_id` where `product_cross_sells`.`parent_id` = 315887

select `products`.*, `product_relations`.`parent_id` as `pivot_parent_id`, `product_relations`.`child_id` as `pivot_child_id` from `products` inner join `product_relations` on `products`.`id` = `product_relations`.`child_id` where `product_relations`.`parent_id` = 315887

select `attributes`.*, `attribute_translations`.`name` as `admin_name`, `attribute_translations`.`locale`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` as `pivot_attribute_group_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` as `pivot_attribute_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`position` as `pivot_position` from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` left join `attribute_translations` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_translations`.`attribute_id` and `attribute_translations`.`locale` = 'en' where `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = 4 and 1 = 1 order by `pivot_position` asc

select `attributes`.*, `attribute_translations`.`name` as `admin_name`, `attribute_translations`.`locale`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` as `pivot_attribute_group_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` as `pivot_attribute_id`, `attribute_group_mappings`.`position` as `pivot_position` from `attributes` inner join `attribute_group_mappings` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_id` left join `attribute_translations` on `attributes`.`id` = `attribute_translations`.`attribute_id` and `attribute_translations`.`locale` = 'en' where `attribute_group_mappings`.`attribute_group_id` = 5 and 1 = 1 order by `pivot_position` asc
